name: an absent routed tool falls back to native enforcement so the file is still enforced
command: printf 'resource "x" "y" {}\n' > ok.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file ok.tf --tools checkov 2>e.txt; grep -q 'dispatch native-fallback file=' e.txt && grep -q 'fallback=native' e.txt && echo absent-falls-back 1>&2
